title: Collate
description: Explore reimagined dimensions, engineer wonders, and catch them all — Collate fuses Create and Cobblemon into a seamless new Minecraft experience.
body:
Minecraft: 1.21.1 - Loader: NeoForge 🧭 Overview Collate transforms Minecraft from the ground up. Every major dimension (Overworld, Nether, and End) has been completely reimagined with new terrain generation, biomes, and structures, creating a fresh and immersive adventure for both explorers and builders. At its core, the pack combines two distinct modded experiences: ⚙️ Create Mod - Design elaborate machinery, automate resources, and power your world through mechanical ingenuity. ⚡ Cobblemon - Catch, train, and battle Pokémon in an open-world Minecraft setting that feels naturally integrated into the game. 🔗 Seamless Integration This modpack doesn’t just include Cobblemon and Create, it connects them: Automate Poké Ball crafting and Cobblemon resources using Create’s contraptions. Build mechanical Poké Centers, training arenas, and Pokémon habitats powered by kinetic energy. Discover biome-specific Pokémon spawns across revamped dimensions, encouraging exploration and engineering creativity alike. 🌌 Key Features Overhauled world generation in every dimension. Smooth integration between Cobblemon and Create gameplay. Balanced progression for survival, exploration, and automation. Custom terrain and structures that reward discovery. Perfect for solo adventures or multiplayer servers. 🧱 Playstyle Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or Pokémon trainer, Collate offers a cohesive, progression-driven world where engineering meets evolution. 🧩 Mod List
⚡ Cobblemon Mods All the mods that bring the world of Pokémon to life in Minecraft — with new features, trainers, and integrations. Cobblemon – The core Pokémon experience in Minecraft: catch, train, and battle! Cobblemon Tim Core – A framework that powers many Cobblemon expansions. Cobblemon Integrations – Seamlessly connects Cobblemon with other world and gameplay mods. Cobblemon Capture XP – Earn XP for catching Pokémon to enhance trainer progression. Cobblemon Counter – Tracks caught Pokémon and completion progress. Cobblemon Interface – Modern UI for battles, boxes, and party management. Cobblemon Pokenav – In-game Pokédex and radar-style navigation tool. Cobblemon Whiteout – Adds a proper “whiteout” mechanic after losing a battle. Cobblemon Unchained – Expands gameplay depth with balance and trainer tweaks. Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn – Dynamic wild Pokémon behavior and encounters. Cobbreeding – Allows Pokémon breeding with immersive mechanics. CobbleFurnies – Adds themed furniture and decorations inspired by Cobblemon. Cobblemore Lib – Library providing compatibility and utility for Cobblemon mods. Radical Cobblemon Trainers (+ API) – Adds trainer NPCs and battle logic for encounters. Cobblemon: Create Industries – Integrates Create machinery with Cobblemon production. SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs – Adds Technical Machines and Records for teaching moves. Cobblemon Pokémon Badges / RCT Badges – Collectable gym badges for your adventure. Ability Upgrade – Upgrade your Pokémon’s abilities for competitive play. Cobblemon Mega Showdown – Adds Mega Evolutions and battle enhancements. Cobbled Armor Trims – Pokémon-inspired armor trims and flair. Tim’s Ultimately Comprehensive Cobblemon Edits of Destiny – Major overhaul improving Pokémon mechanics, moves, and balance. Cobblemon: Parting Gifts – Reward system when Pokémon leave your party. E19 Minimap Icons & Mini’s Cobblemon Icons – Adds Pokémon icons to maps and HUDs. Cobblemon Options Con Tim – Expanded configuration tools for Cobblemon gameplay.
⚙️ Create Mods Harness rotational energy and automation to build complex systems and machines. Create – The cornerstone of mechanical innovation and automation. Create: Copycats+ – Adds decorative and functional building components. Create Deco – Industrial decorations and thematic building blocks. Create Enchantment Industry – Automate enchanting and XP systems. Create Stuff & Additions – Extra gadgets, materials, and tools for Create. Create Crafts & Additions – Adds new machines, cables, and devices. Create: Let the Adventure Begin – Questline and progression integration for Create. Create Slice & Dice – Automatic crop harvesting and slicing machines. Create Goggles – Expanded HUD and item info tools for Create players. Create Encased – Stylish casings for shafts, belts, and gearboxes. Create: Oxidized – Adds weathered brass and copper variants. Create: Bells & Whistles – Decorative enhancements and train station features. Create Jetpack – Jetpack powered by Create’s kinetic energy! Create: Dragons Plus – Adds mechanical dragons compatible with Create systems. Create Stam1o Tweaks – Quality-of-life improvements and balance tweaks. Sophisticated Backpacks Create Integration – Automate storage management using Create contraptions. Sophisticated Storage Create Integration – Combine mechanical and modular storage. Create: Storage Drawers Compat – Connect drawers to Create’s item logistics.
🌍 Terrain & Dimension Mods Overhauled generation and biomes across the Overworld, Nether, and End for endless exploration. Terralith – Massive Overworld worldgen overhaul with hundreds of new biomes. Tectonic – Improves terrain shape, cliffs, and natural elevation. Nullscape – Expands and beautifies the End dimension. Incendium – Transforms the Nether into a fiery adventure world. End Remastered – Unique End progression with special Eyes and structures. Deeper and Darker – Expands the Deep Dark with new biomes and features. Dynamic Trees – Realistic, growing trees that change the forest feel. YUNG’s Better Structures Suite – Adds improved versions of vanilla structures: Better Dungeons Better Strongholds Better Desert Temples Better Nether Fortresses Better End Islands Better Ocean Monuments Better Witch Huts Better Mineshafts Better Jungle Temples Bridges Extras Vanilla Backport: Chase the Skies & The Garden Awakens – Brings upcoming biome and structure features into 1.21. Lithostitched – Enhances terrain transitions and stone blending.
🧰 Quality-of-Life & Performance Mods Enhancements that polish gameplay, visuals, and performance without changing the core Minecraft feel. Roughly Enough Items (REI) – View and search crafting recipes easily. Roughly Enough Professions (REP) – Adds profession search integration for villagers. AppleSkin – Shows hunger and saturation levels in the HUD. Xaero’s Minimap & World Map – Map and waypoint systems for easier navigation. Lootr – Unique loot for every player in generated chests. RightClickHarvest / Smarter Farmers – Simplify and automate crop harvesting. Storage Drawers – Compact and organized item storage solutions. Farmer’s Delight – Cooking and farming expansion with delicious recipes. Supplementaries – Adds useful decorative and functional building blocks. Chipped – Hundreds of new decorative block variants. Carry On – Pick up and move chests, mobs, and machines with ease. Simple Voice Chat – Proximity-based multiplayer voice chat. Clumps – Merges XP orbs for better performance. Dynamic FPS / Sodium / Lithium / FerriteCore / ImmediatelyFast – Optimizations for smooth performance. Iris Shaders & Complementary Shaders – Stunning visual overhauls with shader compatibility. BetterF3 / Default Dark Mode – Cleaner, more informative interface and UI themes. Do a Barrel Roll – Adds smooth camera and roll effects for Elytra. Elytra Slot / Caelus API – Adds a dedicated Elytra equipment slot. Distant Horizons – Extends render distance with level-of-detail loading. Entity Culling / ETF / EMF – Improves rendering performance and visuals for entities. Continuity / Nuit / Dramatic Skys / Better Clouds / Exposure – Enhances lighting, skyboxes, and atmosphere. Not Enough Crashes / No Chat Reports – Improves stability and multiplayer safety. Hardcore Revival – Revive teammates in hardcore mode. GuideME – Helpful in-game guides for mods and mechanics. Boat Item View / What Are They Up To / Better Third Person – Visual and immersion QoL mods. Dynamic Lights (LambDynamicLights) – Realistic handheld light sources.
🧱 Dependencies & Libraries Core APIs and libraries required for the modpack to function smoothly. NeoForge – Mod loader that powers Collate. Architectury API – Cross-platform support library. Moonlight Lib / MidnightLib / Balm / Puzzles Lib / CreativeCore / JamLib / OctoLib / MaFgLib / Cristel Lib / Konkrete / Cumulus / Euphoria Patches / Platform / Resourceful Lib / Resourceful Config / BaguetteLib / Athena / Collective / Kotlin for Forge – Various modding libraries that ensure mod compatibility and functionality. YUNG’s API – Backend system powering YUNG’s structure mods. Cloth Config / Forge Config API / YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) – Configuration libraries. GeckoLib – Animation library used by mobs and models. Curios API / Caelus API – Equipment slot and capability frameworks. Forgified Fabric API / Fabric API / Sinytra Connector – Cross-compatibility and performance APIs. oωo (owo-lib) – UI and configuration support library. Euphoria Patches / Default Dark Mode / E19 - UI Enhancements – Minor UI and visual libraries.
